ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the basketball team */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division in which the team competes */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference to which the team belongs */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins recorded for the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses recorded for the team */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage calculated as wins divided by total games played */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for team creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for team update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference to which the division belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for division creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for division update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for season creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for season update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season in which the game was played */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for game creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for game update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team associated with these metrics */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season to which these metrics belong */,
  "points_scored_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored by the team per game */,
  "points_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Average points allowed by the team per game */,
  "srs" REAL /* Simple Rating System score for the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for metric creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for metric update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for user creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for user update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-team association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for association creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for association update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team to which the player belongs */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Points scored per game by the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for statistic creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for statistic update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage for the game */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage for the game */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage for the game */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for statistic creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for statistic update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins recorded for the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses recorded for the team */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage calculated as wins divided by total games played */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for standing creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for standing update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
